title: Guildrun revealed - Demo LIVE!
contents_preview: Hey everyone! We’re so excited to announce Guildrun, a brand-new PvE roguelike autobattler. The playable demo launches tomorrow at 3pm CEST (9am EST / 6am PST) IS LIVE, allowing you to experience the rifts for yourself.
